use.flag: Enable native PipeWire audio output and PipeWire MIDI synthesizer support.

Install an OpenRC system-wide init script that runs TiMidity++ as the 'timidity' system user. With USE=pipewire, uses native PipeWire output and PipeWire MIDI; without, uses ALSA. Also installs udev rules to auto-connect MIDI devices to the sequencer. Requires USE=alsa or USE=pipewire (or both). See also: media-video/pipewire[system-service].
